error.signature: openai.BadRequestError: This model's maximum context length is 128000 tokens

verdict.summary: Input + output tokens exceed the model's context window. Long conversations, large documents, or system prompts.

dead_ends.action: Truncate the prompt from the beginning
dead_ends.why_fails: Cutting the start loses system prompts and instructions. Truncate middle conversation, keep start and end.

dead_ends.action: Switch to a model with larger context window
dead_ends.why_fails: Larger context = higher cost and latency. Fix the prompt design first.

workarounds.how: Keep last N messages + summary of older messages; summarize when approaching limit

workarounds.action: Use tiktoken to count tokens before sending
Chunk large documents and process separately
workarounds.how: Split into overlapping chunks of ~4000 tokens; process each; combine results
